title: JJC Xaero's Compatibility
description: Makes JujutsuCraft and some other addons related to it be compatible with Xaero's Minimap.
body:
# READ PLSSSS!! 
## This port was made by the owner.
### DEPENDENCIES:

Xaero's Minimap (MUST)
Xaero's Worldmap

### SUPPORTS:

Jujutsu Craft - v49.1 (by: Orca_san)
JujutsuAlm - v1.0.0.8 (by: Almirion)
JJSK - v4.1 (by: Slimeklab) 
JJCV - v2.9 (by: Vazafila)
JJHB - v3.1.2 (by: hb3810)
JJCE - v38 (by: AshuraTheGoat)
jujutsuFaith - v7.6.0 (by: Faith_101)

It supports any version, its just that the newer entities on newer updates wont have an icon.

### RECOMMENDED SETTINGS FOR XAERO'S MINIMAP:

Entity icon Scale: 0.80
Zoom: 2x
Size: 190

This resource pack revises how Jujutsu Craft mobs appear in the Xaero's Worldmap or Minimap. For now, the mod it supports are only Jujutsu Craft and JujutsuAlm (by Almirion) but I am planning on making it support atleast some major Jujutsu Craft addons or some requests. 
There are 2 versions of this resourcepack explained below.

## Fair Play version:
You are not able to spot CT moves or unique Domain icons (except for open domains) in the map. Its less cluttered and makes it fair by not being able to see most surprise attacks.

## Normal version:
You are able to spot CT moves such as Hollow Purpole, unique Domain icons, etc.



Take note that some Domain Expansions has a unique icon around them while some lack this detail due to the not having an entity.



Discord: https://discord.gg/ede6S8drWJ
